explanations.5: The ${1|note,tip,warning,caution,important|} syntax lets the user choose one option from that pipe-separated list when they insert this snippet.
explanations.6: The ${2:title} is a placeholder that gets replaced with whatever the user types second; the number just controls the order of prompts.
explanations.7: The ${3:body} is another placeholder for the user to fill in—think of these numbered slots as a sequence of questions the editor will ask.
